news.title: LongCat-2.0: The Stealth AI Model That Was Quietly Topping OpenRouter All Along
news.summary: The 1.6 trillion-parameter mixture-of-experts model spent two months disguised as "Owl Alpha" before Meituan claimed it—and it undercuts GPT-5.5 and Claude Sonnet 5 on price by a wide margin.

news.title: Robinhood rolls out public blockchain, plans crypto trading for UK residents
news.summary: The company announced a suite of DeFi products, plans for launching crypto trading in the UK and its public mainnet after months of testing.

news.title: Tradeweb executes real-time tokenized US Treasury transaction on Canton Network
news.summary: Franklin Templeton transferred a tokenized US Treasury to Virtu Financial in what Tradeweb said was the first real-time transaction settled against USDCx.

news.title: Bitcoin bounces off 21-month low, but leverage data signals caution: Was $57K the bottom?

news.title: Three models (halving cycle, Mayer Multiple, power-law) all point to a BTC bottom near $45–55K in late 2026
news.summary:
Bitcoin just hit a 1-year low near $58K, down 53% from the October 2025 ATH. Three models built on completely different logic, the halving cycle timing, the Mayer Multiple, and a power-law regression, overlap on the same bottom: roughly $45K to $55K in a Sep to Dec 2026 window. By this read it's cheap but not the cheapest, with 2 of 4 bottom signals lit.

submitted by /u/pwguler <
